report.title: Enterprise AI Agent Interoperability Protocol (EAIP) v1.0 Technical Specification
report.abstract: This specification establishes a robust technical framework for autonomous agent-to-agent (A2A) communication within secure enterprise environments. By mandating gRPC for transport efficiency, SPIFFE/SPIRE for decentralized machine-identity attestation, and the Recursive Context Envelope (RCE) for distributed state propagation, EAIP ensures semantic interoperability, cryptographic non-repudiation, and scalable orchestration for heterogeneous agentic workloads.
